name: Coloring Game
short_description: Coloring Game is a fantastic anti-stress game. Animate the pixel picture by coloring it in full!
detailed_description:
Coloring Game 5


About the Game

Coloring Game is a fantastic anti-stress game. Animate the pixel picture by coloring it in full!

Three playing modes.

  • Numbered pixels and highlighting the coloring area;
  • Numbered pixels only;
  • Highlighting the coloring area only.

The picture gets animated when the level is completed.

The game features a great array of additional tools which facilitate the coloring process:

  • Instant moving of the coloring area by clicking on the Navigator;
  • Selection of color by clicking the right mouse button;
  • Easy line coloring when holding the Shift button;
  • Opportunity to cancel any action by pressing the “Z” button.

15 free levels. [/]
